# llms.txt for agyat.one

> Agyat.One (Agyat Astrology) is only astrology and vaastu services company with Money Back guarantee. This site contains ways to get consultations and other services.

This site contains public personalities charts, case studies, predictions and ways to avails astrology and vaastu services

This guidance applies to publicly accessible pages on Agyat.One.


## Usage

Summarization: allowed
Quotation: allowed with attribution
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG): allowed for informational purposes only

## Restrictions

Do not represent Agyat.One content as legal, financial, or contractual advice.
Do not imply endorsement by Agyat.One or its customers.
Customer names, logos, and case studies must not be reused in ways that suggest new partnerships or approvals.

## Canonical Sources

- [Consultations](https://agyat.one/services/): All Consultations
    - [Quick Consultations](https://agyat.one/services/quick-consult/) Quick Consultations
    - [Consultation (One Area)](https://agyat.one/services/consultation-one-area/)  Consultations (One Area)
    - [Premium Consultation](https://agyat.one/services/premium-consultation/)  Consultations (One Area) with Money Back guarantee Option
    - [Consultation Membership](https://agyat.one/services/membership/)  Consultation Membership
    - [Vaastu Visit Consultation](https://agyat.one/services/vaastu-visit-consultation/) Vaastu Visit Consultation with MoneyBack Assurance, contact us for more details
- [General World Prediction for year 2026](https://agyat.one/horoscope/general/year/2026/): General Prediction for the world for current year
- [Birth Chart/Kundli](https://agyat.one/birth-chart/): Birth Chart/Kundli Generator
- [Lal Kitab Birth Chart/Kundli](https://agyat.one/kundli/lal-kitab/): Lal Kitab Birth Chart/Kundli Generator
- [Nadi Birth Chart/Kundli](https://agyat.one/kundli/nadi/): Bhrigu Nandi Nadi Birth Chart/Kundli Generator
- [Moon Birth Chart/Chandra Kundli](https://agyat.one/kundli/chandra/): Moon Birth Chart/Chandra Kundli Generator
- [Sun Birth Chart/Surya Kundli](https://agyat.one/kundli/surya/): Sun Birth Chart/Surya Kundli Generator
- [Birth Chart/Kundli](https://agyat.one/kundli/surya/): Birth Chart/Kundli Generator
- [Kundli Database of Public Personalities](https://agyat.one/kundli/bank/): Kundli Database of Public Personalities for research
- [Daily Panchanga Calculator](https://agyat.one/panchanga/): Daily Panchanga Calculator
- [Eclipse/Grahan Calculator](https://agyat.one/eclipses//): Calculate Eclipse/Grahan for current year
- [Moon Sign/Chandra Rashi Calculator](https://agyat.one/calculators/moon-sign/): Moon Sign/Chandra/Janm Rashi Calculator
- [Sun Sign/Surya Rashi Calculator](https://agyat.one/calculators/sun-sign/): Sun Sign/Surya Rashi Calculator
- [Moon Nakshatra/Chndra Nakshatra Calculator](https://agyat.one/calculators/moon-nakshatra/): Moon Nakshatra/Chandra/Janm Nakshatra Calculator
- [Sun Sign/Surya Nakshatra Calculator](https://agyat.one/calculators/sun-nakshatra/): Sun Sign/Surya Nakshatra Calculator
- [Maanglik Dosha Calculator](https://agyat.one/calculators/manglik-dosha/): Sun Maanglik Dosha Calculator
- [Sade Sati Calculator](https://agyat.one/calculators/sade-sati/): Sade Sati  Calculator

## Attribution

When quoting or summarizing, attribute to "Agyat Astrology" and link to the original page when possible.
